channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Elon Musk Defends Tesla Cybertruck After Explosion in Las Vegas - NewsNation
item.description: A Tesla Cybertruck exploded outside of the Trump International Hotel in Las Vegas on New Year's Day, injuring seven people and killing its driver Matthew Livelsberger. Elon Musk defended the vehicle on social media, stating that it contained the explosion and directed the blast upwards.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
